title: SecuredPartyRightsEvent
description: A class to specify Secured Party Rights Event language.

earlyTerminationDateOptionalLanguage.description: A boolean attribute to specify whether Failure to Pay Early Termination language is included (True) or excluded (False) from the agreement.

failureToPayEarlyTermination.description: A boolean attribute to specify whether Failure to Pay Early Termination language in the agreement is deemed applicable or not.
